title: Scheduled marker — list.md row schema (v1)
description: Per splock implplan §K.impl.4. SOLE source of truth for the 13-field row contract. Consumed by bin/_marker/parser.py + bin/_marker/create.py + bin/_marker/validate.py. v2.7 ships v1; future bumps via marker_v2.schema.json + migration script.

id.description: Prefix + sequence (e.g., INV.3, ANC.2, DRIFT.1). Prefix is 3–5 letter caps; sequence is integer ≥ 1. Prefix registered in prefix_registry.md.

title.description: One-line summary; no trailing '?' or '.'. Imperative shape preferred. Title-question / title-speculative refusals enforced at create-time, not at schema level.

added_date.description: ISO-8601 date; auto-stamped by bin/marker create.

target.description: Trigger family. closure_trigger = edit-triggered (requires edit-block per §K.impl.6); date = time-triggered; condition = state-triggered.

source_plan.description: Plan slug or literal 'null' string for cross-cutting markers. Pattern aligned with §B plan_v1.schema.json + §C orchestrator_log_v1.schema.json Slug def per §K mid-section review K-02 — allows alphanumeric-start with underscores AND hyphens (e.g., brand_handoff_gate, pipeline-ops-console, self-healing-pipeline).

module.description: Affected module; path prefix or named subsystem (non-empty).

data_needed.description: What evidence/state must exist before closure. 'n/a' is permitted only via --allow-na operator flag (R-DATA-NA-UNAUTHORIZED enforced at create-time).

detail_file.description: Relative path under docs/plans/scheduled_markers/. Lowercase + underscores per prefix_registry.md rule 5. Must exist after create writes it; validate refuses with code 12 if missing.

context.description: One-paragraph human-friendly note: why deferred, who cares, dependencies.

status.description: CLI-managed. Set to 'active' by create; flipped to 'closed' by close.

closed_date.description: ISO-8601 date; auto-stamped by bin/marker close. Required when status=closed; absent when status=active.

closure_resolution.description: Operator-supplied via --resolution flag; non-empty. Required when status=closed; absent when status=active.

emitted_by.description: Closed enum per §K.impl.3. Stored IN the marker entry to record who created it. 'agent' is the reserved bare value (with concrete agent id appended via 'agent:<id>' pattern; v2.7 ships bare 'agent' and substring-match support deferred). NOTE: this is DISTINCT from the §C orchestrator-log-row emitted_by (which is bin/marker:create / :close etc per KNOWN_WRITERS).
